title: Privacy Policy — Ken Arnold Home Inspection

seo.title: Privacy Policy — Ken Arnold Home Inspection
seo.description: How Ken Arnold Home Inspection LLC collects, uses, and protects information submitted through this website. Last updated April 2026.

sections.heading: Privacy Policy
sections.body:
Ken Arnold Home Inspection LLC ("we," "us," "our") operates this website at kahomeinspectionsllc.com. This Privacy Policy explains what information we collect from visitors, how we use it, and the choices you have. Using this site or contacting us through it constitutes acceptance of the terms below.

Information We Collect

We collect information in two ways:

  • Information you provide. When you submit our contact or scheduling form, request a quote, or email us, we receive your name, phone number, email address, property address, and any other details you choose to share. We use this information solely to respond to your request and, if you become a client, to deliver inspection services.
  • Information collected automatically. Like most websites, ours logs basic technical information — IP address, browser type, pages visited, referring URL, and timestamps — for security and analytics. We may use cookies or similar technologies for site functionality and to measure traffic.

How We Use Your Information

  • To respond to inquiries and schedule inspections.
  • To deliver inspection reports and follow-up communications.
  • To improve site performance and content.
  • To comply with legal obligations and protect our rights.

How We Share Information

We do not sell or rent your personal information. We share it only with:

  • Service providers we use to operate our business — for example, scheduling software, report-delivery platforms, and email hosting — under standard confidentiality terms.
  • Authorities when required by law, subpoena, or to protect the safety of any person.
  • With your written consent — for example, sending a copy of your report directly to your real-estate agent or attorney at your request.

Data Retention

Inspection reports and related correspondence are retained for the period required by Massachusetts professional licensing rules (currently three years from the inspection date) and may be retained longer to satisfy legal, accounting, or insurance obligations.

Cookies and Analytics

This site may use first-party cookies for session and preference management, and privacy-respecting analytics to understand aggregate visitor behavior. You can configure your browser to refuse cookies; doing so may affect some site features.

Your Choices

  • You can request access to, correction of, or deletion of your personal information at any time.
  • You can unsubscribe from any non-transactional email by replying or using the unsubscribe link.
  • You can decline cookies via your browser settings.

Children

This site is not directed to children under 13, and we do not knowingly collect information from children. If you believe a child has provided information to us, please contact us so we can remove it.

Security

We use commercially reasonable safeguards to protect the information we hold. No method of transmission or storage is perfectly secure, but we work to keep your data protected.

Changes to This Policy

We may update this policy from time to time. The "Last updated" date at the top reflects the most recent revision. Material changes will be highlighted on this page.

Contact

Questions about this policy or your information? Contact:

Ken Arnold Home Inspection LLC
35 Keets Rd, Deerfield, MA 01342
Phone: (413) 522-8004
Email: ken@kahomeinspectionsllc.com
